summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF NEW ORLEANS AND THE CATHOLIC CHURCH: Brandon recounts experiencing an intense spiritual vision concerning the French Quarter in New Orleans, describing a remote-detonated device disguised as a gas leak. He claims to have seen the oldest active Catholic church in the United States and a vision of Mother Mary, whom he describes as appearing remarkably humble, plain, and wearing a modesty veil with colors reminiscent of a rabbi's prayer shawl. In this account, Mary falls to the feet of Jesus, who is depicted wearing a vibrant metallic red sash. Brandon also asserts that a massive storm in the region was calmed by Jesus and ties these events to historical covenants related to the Louisiana Purchase.

POLITICAL FORECASTS AND DOMESTIC FIGURES: Brandon shares interpretations regarding various political figures, describing a vision of J.D. Vance emerging from a box holding five distinct, elaborate skeleton keys. He expresses concerns about an individual he refers to as a Judas harboring anti-Semitic sentiments and warns of upcoming political turbulence, including a scandal he compares to a modern-day Watergate. Brandon also claims to have seen a demon attempting to influence Donald Trump's mind at the Resolute Desk and predicts attempts to use the 25th Amendment against him. Furthermore, he mentions Marco Rubio and describes Gavin Newsom slithering like a snake toward the White House.

SECURITY ALERTS AND INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS: Brandon discusses domestic infrastructure, specifically mentioning power outages in San Francisco, cyber vulnerabilities within the banking sector, and cartel tunnels in El Paso. He foresees a disruption involving SIM cards targeting emergency services and urges vigilance regarding potential attacks on Trump-branded properties, particularly on the 41st floors. On an international scale, Brandon relays visions of banking fraud in Ukraine and Switzerland, a black horse riding across Europe amidst economic shifting, and an impending alliance between Iraq and Saudi Arabia involving massive oil production. He contrasts a severe drought in Europe and Egypt with a vision of supernatural agricultural prosperity in Israel.

ESCHATOLOGICAL VISIONS AND CHURCH CLEANSING: Brandon details an apocalyptic vision featuring an antichrist figure signing a peace treaty while sitting in a position mimicking Jesus at the Last Supper. In this narrative, a figure identified as Pope Leo kneels before the antichrist, while Satan physically whispers into the antichrist's ear. Brandon also describes the Mount of Olives splitting open following a major earthquake. Concurrently, he asserts that a divine cleansing is imminent within the Christian church, warning that compromised leadership will face judgment.
rawData: [July 19, 2026]-[The Lord showed me what mother Mary really looked like]-[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bTI89Td5Xc4]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to go over some of the news, but first, I'll go over what the Lord showed us in prayer last night. I have to say, out of all the prayers we've had in the last year, for some of the things the Lord showed us, I think it was one of the top ones I've seen in a while. I wasn't anticipating that. I just come in, pray and yield, and the Lord shows you things. There's a lot to it, so I'll go into some of it. I won't go into all of it, but I'll go into some of it. I don't even know where to start. I saw the White House. I saw President Trump. We were praying for Paula White. That's how it all started. We started praying for Paula White and her health and just her in general, because the Lord put it on my heart, too. Then all of a sudden, I started praying for the French Quarter again. We saw the red, white, and blue concerning the French flag—the red, white, and blue for an attack in the French Quarter again. Last time I saw an African-American woman walking down the streets of New Orleans and Bourbon Street. She had red, white, and blue glitter on her skin, and she had glasses that said 250. They looked like those big ones you get at New York Times Square for the New Year, but it looked like 250 on her glasses. She was walking down the main street, and I saw a device in an old building in the French Quarter. It went off and looked like it was a gas leak, but it wasn't a gas leak; it was intentional, by a remote. As I've prayed into that, I still have a caution to pray over New Orleans. I saw red, white, and blue again last night, and I saw the French Quarter again. I thought that was interesting, but it went on from there. I saw J.D. Vance with five keys in his hand—five keys on a big circle keychain. They were all skeleton keys, and each key was different. Some of them were small, and the design at the end of the key looked like something out of a pirate movie, like an old skeleton key; it was very elaborate. The design at the end of every key was very special. They didn't look like a normal skeleton key with just a little piece of metal on the end; every key was very elaborate. They were beautiful-looking keys. Some of them looked very medieval. Some looked evil, but they were pretty in their designs and calligraphy. One key was black and white, another was gold, and another was silver with some tarnish on it, looking like tarnished stainless steel. Another key was polished at the end, but the further it went down to the part that opens the lock, it was very dark. Each of the five keys represented something different. He had the five keys on a keychain and was looking at all five of them. As I was looking at J.D. Vance, he was coming out of a big box. You could see his fingers coming out of the top. The lid was off now, and he was creeping out, coming out of the box of who he truly is and what's really inside of him. I saw the French Quarter and some things I can't talk about, especially with an individual, but I heard from the Lord about the Louisiana Purchase. As I saw the Louisiana Purchase, I heard the Lord say, 'Covenants made, covenants kept. Covenants made, covenants kept, but you didn't keep yours.' He made covenants and kept his side of it, but you didn't keep yours. He's talking about the United States. I saw a massive oak tree come up out of Louisiana. This major oak tree was alive; it had waves to it and was moving before my eyes. It had 250 on the leaves. I saw the old Catholic church in New Orleans that has the horse rider in front. I didn't realize that was a Civil War monument. Based on what I understand from Diana's research, this is the oldest active Catholic church in America. It's the oldest church that still holds weekly services; that's what Diana told me. I saw that beautiful church near the Mississippi River. The Lord was showing me that church. Out of it came a single candlestick—a beautiful candle. There was only one candle there. It was in a candlestick holder made out of olive wood. It was beautiful, with different colors, and it had a ring for your finger so you could carry it. Suddenly, Mother Mary came out of the Catholic church. This is very interesting. I'm going to describe the way I saw Mother Mary. She wasn't a shrine or a statue; she was real. She had a blue head covering on, like a modesty veil. It was blue and white, similar to the Jewish flag. It had blue, white, and gold, like you see on a rabbi's prayer shawls with the knots. She was wearing the same colors. She looked like a young woman. I'm not trying to be disrespectful, but she was not traditionally beautiful, nor was she ugly. She looked humble and pure. Her countenance looked average, perhaps even below average. I tried to describe this to my wife, Diana, all day. She had brown eyes and sandy brown hair, the same color as our daughter Paisley's, not like Megan's. She had olive skin, not white or Caucasian. Her cheeks were full, but she looked very plain. If you walked by her, you might find her forgettable. She looked very humble in her demeanor and face. She looked broken, like a pliable person. I don't know how else to say it. The way her hair was and everything. Then I saw Jesus in the vision and he was wearing a white robe with a metallic red sash. He had a beautiful, vibrant, shimmery, sparkly sash on. I've never seen that before. Every time it's always been purple or other colors, but this was a vibrant red sash. She fell down at his feet and she was touching the nail scars in his feet. She put her hair and her bonnet, her shawl down over her as she went for his feet and was touching the nail scars in his feet. She had her hair about his feet and she was worshiping Jesus in reverence at his feet. I saw a great storm in New Orleans. I saw a great storm in the east. I saw waves—it's the Gulf, but it's not right there, it's further in—but I saw waves around him that looked like a major storm. And he said, 'Peace to the storm,' and all of a sudden that storm became silent. He said to me, 'Tell my people to believe me, for a wave of my glory is going to come through the camera tonight. If they'll believe me for it, I'll heal them what they're asking for.' I saw a wave of the glory of God flow through this vision going through the lens of the camera, and the presence of the Lord filled my house. He spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, what would you like to have tonight?' I told him privately what I was believing for, and I felt the presence of the Lord fill me. As I saw Mary, she had tears in her eyes and they were streaming down her cheeks as she had her face to the Father, to Jesus. I could see Mary, and she was nothing I ever pictured her to be because of the statues I've seen in Catholic churches. She doesn't look like that. Her face is more full. It wasn't skinny, but it wasn't fat; it was not bony looking. She didn't have a defined jawline; it was more full cheeks. She reminded me of someone from South America; I've seen Latino women look like that in the face. I try really hard, but I was taken back because I kept wanting to look at more detail of Mother Mary. I saw her weight; I told Diana she looked like she's 125 pounds, maybe 130 at the most. She's about 5'5". She was a little woman. Jesus was about six foot. He has about a size 11 foot, the way I could see it. So she came up to right underneath him. As she fell down to his feet, it was something to behold. When I have visions like that—I told Diana when I was allowed to go into the garden and I saw Adam and Eve—I tried to describe them the best I could. I said, 'She looked nothing like Eve. Eve's eyes were a color I've never seen before.' Adam looked very chiseled; he had no fat on him. His beard was perfect. Everything was perfect about Adam and Eve. But this was something I've never seen before. As I was looking at Mother Mary, I was taken back by it. I saw the way the Lord looked at it and he said, 'A Judas will rise in America.' He spoke about a certain individual and I saw him have anti-Semitism deep inside his heart toward the Jewish people. You will see the true person come out even more in the days ahead. The Lord said he is a Judas, a true Judas, worse than Pence. I'm not trying to tick anyone off, I'm just repeating what I heard. You want to challenge it? Fine. It was clear. I felt the glory of the Lord and I heard what he said: 'Judas, his heart.' I'm not trying to judge a man, I'm just telling you what I heard. If it doesn't line up, pray about it. Put it on the shelf and take it to God in prayer. I saw a covenant made, covenants kept, but you didn't keep yours. It was concerning the Catholic Church and New Orleans. He said, 'If this Louisiana Purchase didn't take place, America would not have been what it is.' It was concerning the Catholic Church as I saw Mother Mary come out of the big church in New Orleans. I didn't know that was the oldest active church in the United States. Then I saw certain things concerning the Jews coming and terrorist attacks upon this nation. The Lord said, 'Harbingers, harbingers again from 9/11.' I know Jonathan Cahn wrote a lot of books about harbingers and the sycamore tree at Ground Zero. The Lord said there's something about the Louisiana Purchase that is very significant to American history and covenants that were made. My wife is doing research to find out what was being said as the vision was so strong. I saw a Judas and an undermining in the days ahead of President Trump to make him look like he's an idiot—the 25th—that he's senile. 'He's getting old, he's not as sharp as he used to be, he's just slipping a little bit.' It got worse and worse. I don't know where I'd be at 80 years old; running a country is a big deal. Anyone running a country at 80 years old, going on 81 now, that's a huge deal. This is the difference between the mindset of somebody who is quitting versus somebody who is still thriving. As I prayed into it, I saw another 9/11-style disturbance. I saw a plot with the SIM cards in New York to disrupt the 911 service. It's in another building and they rebuilt it. He warned us about this. I want to show you some of the things we saw in the news today and then we're going to go pray. I saw a terrorist wearing mirrored aviator glasses. So, here is a BlackRock CEO talking about the Clarity Act. Let's listen to what he has to say about the Clarity Act. This is BlackRock's CEO—well, I don't know if he's the CEO, but he was a BlackRock executive. Listen to this guy: "I think the likelihood of that happening is now sub-50%. I'm still optimistic that if it doesn't happen by the August recess, it'll happen this year. I do think the regulators now, with the CFTC and the SEC, can probably rule-write most of what we need. The problem with rule-writing is it's much more reversible than what you see when it joins the statute. I've been spending a lot of time in Asia; I've been in Korea and Hong Kong four times in the last nine months. They have, on the one hand, been waiting for the Clarity Act. I actually think if it's not passed, you're going to see Asian local governments pass equivalents to try to catch up and even get ahead of the U.S. So, I'm long-term very optimistic. I just think we need, no pun intended, a lot more clarity, not just about U.S. regulation, but about global rates and geopolitics. And let's not underestimate: you go to South Korea and all you hear about is Samsung and Hynix. We need this AI super cycle." So he's saying he believes it's 50/50 to pass before August. Interesting. And then this guy, he's talking about—he said he's tired of being in "crypto hell." He wants America to lead in digital assets. He said we need a structure. You know, a small bipartisan group is still trying to get a Clarity Act done. I want you to hear this: "You would not want a Clarity Act that increased the ability of illicit finance to take place suddenly with the blessings of law, would you?" "It's vital that the Clarity Act provide rules and tools for the Treasury Department and the administration to be able to counter illicit finance. But you would be concerned if the Trump Department of Justice, with technical assistance, said that the standard proposed by industry and some of my Republican colleagues would actually make it easier for illicit finance to take place. This has just happened in the last couple of days; that would concern you, wouldn't it?" "It would be concerning, yes, Senator." "I tend to work with you and the Secretary. I want this done and I am tired of being in crypto hell, but we've got to do it in a way that doesn't make this circumstance worse. I want America to lead in digital assets, but if we get it wrong, the downside ramifications could be huge as well." Next, we have massive power outages in San Francisco as a system glitch warns of chaotic blackouts. Something's happened with the power grid substations. Massive power outages strike San Francisco; a system glitch warns of chaotic blackouts. They had a massive power outage Saturday morning that knocked out electricity for quite a bit of people. The Lord warned us about this; the Lord warned about the substations. The Lord warned us to pray for power outages in America in major cities because the enemy within has a plan. I told you to pray against the enemy within. This is an act of war and they're in our country. There's chaos going on all over San Francisco because of it. The lights are off; even the little cars are frozen on the road. People don't know what to do. Next: hide your kids, hide your wives. All right, next. Now, I want you to hear this. In a couple of weeks, Prime Minister Benjamin comes to New York, and this is the response of Mamdani: "Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is perhaps planning to visit New York for the UN General Assembly. You pledged during your campaign to order his arrest to comply with the International Criminal Court warrant. What will happen if he comes in September?" "I believe that Prime Minister Netanyahu belongs in the Hague. He's a war criminal who has been charged by the International Criminal Court, and what you will find is that is an opinion held by many purely because of what his actions have wrought over these last many years. I've also said that I will follow the laws that we have here in New York City, because I believe there's an importance in following the law as a leader who presides over our city." "Meaning that whatever the law allows me to do in New York City, that's what we will do, but we won't be writing our own laws to that end. We are looking at all of our legal obligations, and one of them is with regards to the United Nations. But we're not talking about a personal assessment of Benjamin Netanyahu; we're talking about the International Criminal Court and the fact that they have a warrant out for this Prime Minister's arrest. I'll be following the laws of New York City." Finally, they found a tunnel from Mexico. The cartel is running a secret underground highway right under the feet of El Paso, Texas. A major cartel. Now, we know what the Lord has showed us about these tunnels. And I said, "There's major tunnels in Nogales." And the Lord showed us about Nogales. And he said, "There's tunnels." Well, we have them in El Paso. And look at this. This is elaborate. This cost some money to get this tunnel. Drain system that Border Patrol says cartels exploit to smuggle narcotics and illegal migrants into the US. This whole system is a city underneath our city. Fox News got rare exclusive access going underground with Border Patrol's elite confined space entry team. We're about a mile and a half from Mexico. It takes smugglers and illegal migrants about 45 minutes to an hour to get through here. And to give some perspective, it's hot, it's dark here, and the air quality is not great. Just outside one of the storm drain entrances: tools, a wallet, even a Mexican driver's license. The El Paso Sector team says there's 32 known entry points and hundreds of exits throughout the city. "We do have technology that lets us know when they're in there, where they're going, when they come out, and technology grows at a rapid pace." Agents on this specialized team undergo intense training to navigate these tight underground passageways while monitoring dangerous changes in oxygen levels. "What's most difficult for you?" "For me, it's the heat and the time in the air." So far this fiscal year, Border Patrol says they've apprehended 161 illegal migrants using El Paso's storm drain system. At the height of the border crisis, agents say they encountered groups of up to 70 migrants underground. Today, it's usually just two or three at a time. We found weapons down here. We found guns down here. The numbers are down, but agents say the cartels are still looking for any gap they can exploit. "Our agents are engaged with the war with cartels on a daily basis in El Paso, Texas." Brooke Taylor, Fox News. Pretty amazing. So, they're making their ways through like mole people. And so the Lord warned us how they were doing it, and he talked about Nogales a lot and in other places. So interesting. All right, keep going. Okay, here's the alert. What's the alert? No, they're saying the United States is warning about attacks against American interests, foreign and domestic. Okay, so this is what we've been praying about. And so they issued a high alert for American citizens to be watching for an attack against the American homeland, for attacks against American interests, Trump Towers, Trump buildings in other cities, in other nations. So we're going to be praying. This is part of it. And so there's a list that they're believing are high interest for Saudi Arabia to take out for Trump Towers. This is all the buildings that he has in other foreign countries. And so we are praying for those buildings, but I'm specifically concerned about New York, the 41st floor of major buildings of Trump, hotels—and I don't know why the 41st floor, y'all. I just saw the numbers to pray over the 41st floor. Praying over his hotels, his apartment complexes, his—not apartments. They're not apartments. They're like penthouses, gorgeous homes in the air in New York and Chicago or whatever. Just praying for Trump locations. I've seen them on fire. I've seen them exploding. I've seen major things falling down with people deliberately sabotaging them. And so we will continue to pray for Trump headquarters, praying for Don Jr., praying for his kids—very serious right now—and for them to put out an alert for everybody to be watching and to use caution, worldwide caution concerning American interests right now because they are believing that we're about to be hit. It is very serious about Cuba sending over these drones that I saw—major drone strikes. But it's not just about America. I'm telling you, I saw an attack worse than October 7th happening in the middle of the night using chemical weapons against the Jewish people in Israel. And it will be a major thing when I saw how I saw this happening with boils and convulsing. It was awful what happened to children and families in the days ahead. And I pray we stop it with prayer that it will not happen. And so this is just—it's very serious, an alert, worldwide caution. So they're telling everybody—I don't know if you knew about that. Did you all know about this? The worldwide alert that the White House told everybody today. So use caution if you live in major cities specifically. I would use major caution. Okay, keep going. And they struck this tunnel. Who did? We did. Okay, so we struck a tunnel and then they're trying to get their bulldozers to clean it out. The Iranian people want to clean it out. What's the tunnel? I don't know. It looks like just a tunnel. I don't understand. Yeah. So, it's like a highway. I don't see like a military complex. Interesting. I don't know why they struck... Okay. What is that? Two people died. So we lost two soldiers today. God, we pray for their families and the loss for their families. This hit a military base in Jordan. So, it hit a military base in Jordan and two of our service members lost their lives today. Okay. That's pretty much it. Okay. And I want you to hear JD Vance. This is JD Vance. And he said some things. "There are some people within their system, we know beyond a shadow of a doubt, who are manipulating and trying to change American public opinion to keep the war going on indefinitely. No one wants the Iran war to go on perpetually. Iran exists and their main focus is eliminating Israel. Do you want them just to absorb every rocket?" I'm kind of disappointed in the vice president. You know me, I am not what you would call a hawk. But I understand what the defense of the country means and our greatest ally means. Part of the comments that concerned me wasn't even so much of that one, is that he said that he found himself to be a moderate on the issue with Israel. That's not what the president stands for. The president made it very clear that that is our closest ally and that we will work with them. Now, there are some times where the president says that he needs to call Bibi off a little bit, that he wants to go a little further than the president is comfortable with because he's balancing what's happening in the Arab world and what's happening with Israel as well. But to say that there are people that are on air that are trying to pressure the administration some way in the advancement of Israel and not our own country's interest, that is categorically false. I don't know what that report that's going around is, but that's not what the president stands for. So, that was disappointing. He's always welcome on our program to talk about it. But being moderate when it comes to Israel, that is not the Republican position. Okay. So, it's already what they're saying is just what I heard last night. Isn't that amazing? Quickly. Okay. Keep going. Go ahead. I'm very frustrated by the Americans and frankly by people in other countries who are like, 'You cannot negotiate with the Iranians.' As far as I'm concerned, it's just a waste of time dealing with them. They're liars. There's something wrong with them. They're cuckoo. I don't want to deal with them anymore. They're scum. You know what scum is? They're scum. They're sick people. They're led by sick people. And they're vicious, violent people. And if they had a nuclear weapon, they'd use it. I'm very frustrated. Next. So, let's pray tonight. We're going to pray for our president. We're going to pray that he would take no counsel from the ungodly. Ivy League education. I told you, I said Harvard, which is not Harvard-Yale. Harvard. Thinking in a stone wall—in a stone wall—I told you this back last year and I saw a stone wall and I saw Harvard. I said the liberal thinking will come out more in the days ahead. Remember what I warned you all about? Does anybody remember that vision? I said it'd be like Harvard. And I said 'Ivy,' and the Lord said, 'Take no counsel from ungodly.' That's what the Lord said. Pray for—and I saw a fish and a chameleon. And I said, 'A chameleon that is able to change color in the White House.' A chameleon changes and adapts to the surroundings of what it needs to. It's not very stable. A chameleon is able to blend into its surroundings. And the Lord said, 'Pray for godly counsel around and about it.' As he was standing on the White House, he was standing on the steps of the Capitol and his head was a bobblehead. It was a big bobblehead and was bobbling around and his neck was very skinny and he was looking toward the White House. President Trump was at the desk, the Resolute Desk, and he was writing, but there was a demon that was poking and pecking at his brain and I saw it. They were trying to come against him with the 25th Amendment. Then I saw Rubio at the bottom of the stairs and he was looking up and his eyes got big like cartoon eyes. And then I saw a peacock wrap around the building with the tail and wrap around the Capitol. And I thought that was interesting. I still think it's interesting. So we pray for President Trump's mind. Pray for his mind. Pray for him to make it and finish strong. People get mad at me all the time, but I just tell you what I see in the spirit. I'll be real with you. I look at politics just like this: I throw it in the air. I really don't care about it a lot. It's just the honest-to-God truth about Brandon Biggs. I don't look at politics; they're not going to save America. I don't care who's behind the White House if it's Joe Biden or Obama or President Trump or Ronald Reagan. The only person who's going to save America is the Lord Jesus Christ. An awakening unto God. There's no political person that'll help and make things better by voting that way, by keeping godly laws in motion. But the bottom line is the only person that's ever going to save America is Jesus. And he'll use people, and it's a lot easier probably to use a Trump than an Obama by far, or a Joe Biden. But I don't focus so much about it. I don't drink the Kool-Aid of it. It's all propaganda. All this stuff is on the news. I just go 'Whatever, man.' But we bring it to you because this is what the Lord has us praying about. And he wants us praying for our nation. Praying for President Trump to stay strong. Praying for 2028 for who gets it next—not waiting until January of 2028 and going, 'We probably should pray about it right now.' We need to uncover who God wants in the office now to pray for because I told you Gavin Newsom's going to go like on his belly, slithering like a snake headed to the White House, licking the dirt. I saw him leaving California and start heading towards there and he looked like a snake; he had snake eyes. He had reptilian eyes. And so we pray, but I know I feel in my heart it's Rubio. And I'll say it, I believe there's a hand on Rubio continually, that he kept saying he has slain his tens of thousands and the other one has slain his thousands. And we pray for Cuba for a major liberation of Cuba in the days ahead. The accomplishments of the Secretary of State. And I saw Byron—pray for Byron. I saw a scandal coming with JD. I saw a scandal. I told you a white—and it's funny, the Nixon thing. And the Lord kept saying, 'This will be a new modern-day Whitewater, Watergate.' Watergate 2028. They'll try to do that. Watergate 2028 and I saw him pulling back and I saw Byron trying to rise up and the Lord saw—as I was praying for Byron. So if he does win Florida, it might be short-lived that he might be vice president. I don't know. I just keep praying into this. I don't want to add to or take away from anything and be flaky. I don't want to add to any prophetic confusion and weirdness like we had in 2020. There was a lot of weirdness. Everybody's saying, everybody thinking, 'Oh, that President Trump's going to win.' And he lost. And I told everybody because I remember everybody said, 'What do you think about that?' I said, 'He's going to lose. He's not going to win.' And I remember hearing it in July of that year and the Lord said, 'He's not going to win.' And people got really ticked off about that. I remember, 'Oh, Brandon, you're so anti-America.' Whatever. I'm telling you what I hear. I'm not here to sugarcoat your ears and your lips to make you like me or not like me. I don't really care if you click off and go watch somebody else that wants to feed you some kind of poopy stuff. I'm not going to do it. I'm going to tell you what I hear. I don't fear you; I fear God. If you leave, you leave. But I'll be standing here telling you what the Lord always said. And I want to say, 'Hey, I told you so,' but it'll be, 'Hey, what He told you,' not what Brandon—I don't have nothing. I yield to him. It's not easy being on this side of the camera telling you what I'm hearing about the Catholics and about what I saw about JD Vance and the keys—five keys. I don't know what they meant. I'm still trying to figure it out. But he came out of a box and I saw it and he's talking about covenants concerning the Louisiana Purchase. I'm just like, 'Interesting.' But that's what we got last night. And we continue to pray for this beautiful nation that we remain one nation under God. But the Lord warned me 2027, 2028, 2029, you'll see socialistic control concerning the internet and they will grab ahold of your Facebook, all these other platforms and they are going to try to control what you are able to say and what you are able to hear in the days ahead concerning the First Amendment. And a spider started to put a web around it and it was trying to wrap it like it does its prey. And I saw a major shaking come to this nation. And I've seen shakings concerning earthquakes and major signs we'll see that will bring people to their knees—fearful sights. And so I just believe with all my heart, we're about to see things we've never seen before with politics. And as I was praying—was it the middle of the night? Yeah. Last night he woke me up and he said, 'I want to talk to you about the cleansing of the church more.' And he showed me specific preachers' faces. And he said, 'These people's days are numbered. They're about to come home.' And I saw people that were going to be and they're not. And he said, 'Judgment begins in the house of the Lord first, Brandon. There's things that I've warned and I've warned and I've warned to get your heart right, to get your life right, and they continue to go down the wrong road.' And he said, 'Because of this, there's a shaking in the church.' As we were praying about it last night, a shaking. Are you all in? Does your life have compromise? Is your lamp full of oil? Are you a bride that's seeking him? Are you more in bed with the world? He's cleaning up the church, especially the leadership. To whom much is given, much is required. And I'm telling you, you're about to see an acceleration of that. I saw even going into October and he said he circles things and he talks to me about it. He said, 'I warned and I warned. I've warned and I've warned. I've warned and I've warned.' And you'll see major faith ministries that they'll have pastors that are no longer there anymore. Ivy League education.
